ModMetadata.Name: IC10 Define Workaround
ModMetadata.Author: Vespinian
ModMetadata.Description:
This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
Defines that start with an underscore can now be used in l or s instruction. For example this works:
define _test $D52
Main: yield l r0 _test On seqz r0 r0 s _test On r0 j Main
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500> Write Trade Data Extended </color></size> This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
Defines that start with an underscore can now be used in l or s instruction. For example this works:
define _test $D52
Main: yield l r0 _test On seqz r0 r0 s _test On r0 j Main
